name: reinforcement-learning
description: Implementation of Reinforcement Learning Algorithms. Python, OpenAI Gym, Tensorflow. Exercises and Solutions to accompany Sutton's Book and David Silver's course.

commits.message: Update CliffWalk REINFORCE with Baseline Solution.ipynb
Updated links to new version of Sutton's book
fixed shape descriptions for neural network input layer

Updates function description in DP. Fixed typos in MC. Changed Lambda to Gamma as in the book.
Sync function descriptions. Lambda -> gamma (discount factor). Added description of env.nS and env.nA
Fixed issues with the DQN in the exercise notebook
Updated to support recent versions of TF. Removed deprecated functions. Pointed out in #117
Fixed some of the issues with the DQN script as pointed out in #117
worker name scope should have trailing backslash otherwise any worker 10-19 will clash in scope with worker 1, and so on.
bind worker within lambda to avoid running worker twice
DQN copy_model_parameters memory leak fixed, tensorboard summaries updated with cpu/mem usage
